analyst_note: Q4 2024: Record-breaking quarter for victim count (1,663 — highest ever at time of recording). Payment rate hit historic low of 25% (Coveware). Payments continued declining despite surging attack volume — divergence fully established. Coveware median payment fell to $110,890 by Q4, down 45% from Q1 2024 peak of $250,000. Full-year 2024 payments: $813.55M (revised to ~$892M in Chainalysis 2026 report).

a1._label: Russian Domestic Actions Against Ecosystem Actors
a1.notes: No documented RU domestic actions Q4 2024. LockBitSupp sanctioned but not detained. No follow-on to Khoroshev attribution. RU posture consistent with prior quarters: passive tolerance.

a2._label: Time Lag: Referral to Observable Russian Action

a3.notes: Populate from analyst model. Consistent RU non-response to Khoroshev attribution suggests protection relationship for LockBitSupp remains active or RU has no operational interest in acting.

events.name: Operation Magnus — Redline/Meta Infostealer Takedown
events.notes: FBI/Dutch Police/Europol seized infrastructure of Redline and Meta infostealer operations. Not ransomware directly — targets upstream credential supply chain feeding RaaS ecosystem. Score: 7 (significant infrastructure disruption to feeder ecosystem, no core ransomware operator arrests).

b1.notes: Q4 2024 LE actions primarily targeted upstream infrastructure rather than ransomware operators directly. Operation Magnus disrupted credential theft supply chain — indirect but structurally significant pressure on the ecosystem.

b2.notes: Ecosystem fragmenting but stabilizing around RansomHub. Multiple new RaaS brands emerged (Fog, Lynx, Cicada3301 active). Forum dispute volume relatively calm. Ecosystem adapting to post-LockBit/ALPHV environment. Record Q4 victim count suggests operational capacity fully reconstituted. ANALYST INFERENCE.

c1._label: Ransom Payment Volume vs. Victim Count
c1.crypto_price_note: BTC price surged from ~$60K to ~$97K in Q4 2024 post-US election — nominal USD payments may be understated due to reporting timing vs crypto price
c1.source: Chainalysis 2025 Crypto Crime Report (full year $813.55M; H2 $353.75M est.); ransomware.live Q4 victim count = 1,663 (record at time)
c1.notes: CREDIBILITY NOTE: Payment volume is ANALYST ESTIMATE from H2 total. Divergence CONFIRMED this quarter: victim count at record high while payments at annual low. Coveware confirmed overall payment rate of 25% (historic low) in Q4 2024. This quarter establishes the divergence metric baseline.

c2.source: Coveware Q4 2024: overall payment rate 25% (historic low at time)
c2.notes: Coveware confirmed 25% overall payment rate Q4 2024. Sector-level breakdown: populate from Coveware Q4 2024 quarterly report. Median payment fell to $110,890 (down 45% from Q1 2024 peak of $250,000).

c3.source: ransomware.live Q4 2024; Corvus Insurance Q4 2024 Cyber Threat Report
c3.notes: Record victim count Q4 2024 — highest single quarter at time of recording. No major LE-initiated takedowns of primary ransomware leak sites. November 2024 noted as record-breaking month within Q4. RansomHub, Play, LockBit (degraded), Akira driving volume.
